_comment: VULNERABLE: CodeBuild service role with excessive permissions
_description: This IAM policy is attached to the CodeBuild project's service role. It grants far more access than needed for building and pushing container images.

Statement._vulnerability: Can read ANY SSM parameter including production secrets, database passwords, API keys
Can read/write/delete any S3 bucket including backups, customer data, terraform state
Can push to ANY ECR repository, including production images
Can assume ANY role in the account, including admin roles. Build can escalate to full account admin.
Can decrypt any KMS-encrypted secret in the account
